name: graceful-rm
description: Installs and documents a safer Linux rm replacement that moves files to a time-limited trash.

interface.longDescription: Graceful RM installs a Linux command that rejects dangerous targets, moves accepted paths to /var/lib/graceful-rm/trash, and expires them after three days.
defaultPrompt: Install graceful-rm on this Linux system.
Explain why this path is blocked by graceful-rm.
